title: Extract claims from second staged-ingested source (mock spine step)
problem: ticket-152 proves fetch and ingest-staged for OpenAlex rank #2 (W1234567890). Operators cannot run extract-claims on the second staged source with deterministic mock LLM fixtures.
acceptance_criteria: After ticket-152 spine through ingest-staged, extract-claims on rank #2 source produces deterministic accepted/rejected claims from mock fixture.
Unit test uses distinct mock HTML/fixture for constraint-management candidate.
No live LLM in default pytest collection.
Golden tests remain mock-only and pass.
rollback_plan: Remove second-candidate extract test and fixture; retain ticket-152 fetch/ingest.
